parameters.text:
={{ 'Evaluate this job for Preston Bezant:

Company: ' + $json.Company + '
Title: ' + $json.Title + '
URL: ' + $json.URL + '

Job Description:
' + $json.jdText }}

={{ 'Generate a tailored CV for this job:

Company: ' + $json.Company + '
Role: ' + $json.Title + '
Archetype: ' + $json.eval.archetype + '
Keywords: ' + ($json.eval.keywords || []).join(', ') + '
CV Match: ' + ($json.eval.cv_match || []).join(', ') + '
Gaps: ' + ($json.eval.gaps || []).map(g => g.gap).join(', ') }}

={{ 'Write a cover letter for Preston Bezant:

Company: ' + $json.Company + '
Role: ' + $json.Title + '
Eval Summary: ' + $json.eval.summary + '
CV Match points: ' + ($json.eval.cv_match || []).slice(0,3).join('; ') + '
CV Title: ' + $json.cvData.title + '
CV Summary: ' + $json.cvData.summary }}

={{ 'Generate application form answers for:

Company: ' + $json.Company + '
Role: ' + $json.Title + '
Eval Summary: ' + $json.eval.summary + '
CV Match: ' + ($json.eval.cv_match || []).join(', ') }}
